mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO knowledge_file_chunk ( knowledge_base_id, file_id, section_id, parent_section_id, chunk_index, chunk_strategy, chunk_size, chunk_overlap, title_path, content_preview, content_hash, content_size, start_offset, end_offset, storage_bucket, storage_object_key, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{entity.knowledgeBaseId}, #{entity.fileId}, #{entity.sectionId}, #{entity.parentSectionId}, #{entity.chunkIndex}, #{entity.chunkStrategy}, #{entity.chunkSize}, #{entity.chunkOverlap}, #{entity.titlePath}, #{entity.contentPreview}, #{entity.contentHash}, #{entity.contentSize}, #{entity.startOffset}, #{entity.endOffset}, #{entity.storageBucket}, #{entity.storageObjectKey}, #{entity.createdAt}, #{entity.updatedAt} )
